recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: nrtk-albumentations
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: Fork of Albumentations in direct support of NRTK (Natural Robustness Toolkit). Fast, flexible, and advanced augmentation library for deep learning, computer vision, and medical imaging. Offers a wide range of transformations for both 2D (images, masks, bboxes, keypoints) and 3D (volumes, volumetric masks, keypoints) data, with optimized performance and seamless integration into ML workflows.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Vladimir Iglovikov
